title: Luxury Sea-View Apartment in Bandra
description: Stunning 3BHK apartment with panoramic sea views in the heart of Bandra. Features modern interiors, Italian marble flooring, modular kitchen, and 24/7 security. Walking distance to Bandstand Promenade and top restaurants.

title: Modern Villa in Whitefield Tech Corridor
description: Spacious independent villa near ITPL and major tech parks. Features private garden, rooftop terrace, home automation, rainwater harvesting, and covered car parking for 2 vehicles. Gated community with clubhouse and swimming pool.

title: Heritage Haveli Conversion in Pink City
description: Beautifully restored heritage haveli converted into a luxury residence. Original Rajasthani jharokhas, courtyard with fountain, modern amenities blended with traditional architecture. Prime location near Rambagh Palace.

title: Penthouse Suite in Salt Lake Sector V
description: Exclusive penthouse in Kolkata's IT hub with wrap-around terrace offering city skyline views. Smart home features, designer bathrooms, private elevator access, and premium club membership included.

title: Commercial Office Space in Connaught Place
description: Prime commercial office space in the heart of Delhi's business district. Grade-A building with central AC, power backup, high-speed elevators, ample parking, and metro connectivity. Ideal for corporate headquarters.

title: Beachfront Villa in Calangute
description: Stunning beachfront villa just 200m from Calangute Beach. Portuguese-inspired architecture with infinity pool, open-air dining, landscaped gardens, and dedicated staff quarters. Perfect holiday home or rental investment.

title: 2BHK Apartment near Powai Lake
description: A modern 2BHK apartment offering stunning views of Powai Lake. Close proximity to Hiranandani Gardens and top schools.
